description: Creating comprehensive figure showing DNAJC28 domain architecture, J-domain alignment, and functional scorecard
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(16, 14), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [1.5, 2, 1.5]})

# ---- Panel 1: DNAJC28 Domain Architecture ----
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_xlim(0, 400)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 3)

# Full protein bar
ax1.barh(1.5, 388, height=0.6, left=1, color='lightgray', edgecolor='black', linewidth=1)
ax1.text(194, 1.5, 'DNAJC28 (388 aa)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

# J-domain
ax1.barh(1.5, 65, height=0.6, left=51, color='#4CAF50', edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5, alpha=0.8)
ax1.text(83, 1.5, 'J-domain\n(51-115)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='white')

# HPD motif within J-domain
ax1.barh(1.5, 3, height=0.6, left=79, color='red', edgecolor='darkred', linewidth=1.5)
ax1.annotate('HPD\n79-81', xy=(80, 1.2), xytext=(80, 0.5), fontsize=9, ha='center',
            fontweight='bold', color='red', arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red'))

# DJC28-specific C-terminal domain (PF09350)
ax1.barh(1.5, 69, height=0.6, left=203, color='#2196F3', edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5, alpha=0.8)
ax1.text(237, 1.5, 'DJC28_CD\n(203-271)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='white')

ax1.set_title('DNAJC28 Domain Architecture', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
ax1.set_xlabel('Residue Position')
ax1.set_yticks([])

# ---- Panel 2: J-domain Alignment ----
ax2 = axes[1]

# Aligned sequences centered on HPD
alignment_data = [
    ('DNAJC28', 'SADEVRESFHKLAKQY', 'HPD', 'SGSNTADSATFIRIEKAYRKVLS', True),
    ('DNAJA1',  'NATQEELKKAYRKLALKY', 'HPD', 'KNPNEGEKFKQISQAYEVLSD', False),
    ('DNAJA2',  'GASENELKKAYRKLAKEY', 'HPD', 'KNPNAGDKFKEISFAYEVLSN', False),
    ('DNAJB1',  'ASDEEIKRAYRRQALRY', 'HPD', 'KNKEPGAEEKFKEIAEAYDVLS', False),
    ('DNAJC5',  'ATSDDIKKSYRKLALKY', 'HPD', 'KNPDNPEAADKFKEINNAHAI', False),
    ('DNAJC10', 'TASSREIRQAFKKLALKL', 'HPD', 'KNPNNPNAHGDFLKINRAYEV', False),
    ('E.coli DnaJ','AEEREIRKAYKRLAMKY','HPD', 'RNQGDKEAEAKFKEIKEAYEV', False),
]

y_positions = list(range(len(alignment_data), 0, -1))

for idx, (name, helix2, hpd, post, is_target) in enumerate(alignment_data):
    y = y_positions[idx]
    
    # Color scheme
    bg_color = '#FFF9C4' if is_target else 'white'
    name_weight = 'bold' if is_target else 'normal'
    name_color = 'red' if is_target else 'black'
    
    ax2.text(-0.5, y, name, ha='right', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight=name_weight, 
             color=name_color, family='monospace')
    
    # Helix II residues
    for j, aa in enumerate(helix2):
        x = j - len(helix2)
        color = '#81C784' if aa in 'KR' else '#64B5F6' if aa in 'LIVFYWM' else '#EEEEEE'
        ax2.text(x, y, aa, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, family='monospace',
                bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.15', facecolor=color, alpha=0.6))
    
    # HPD motif
    for j, aa in enumerate(hpd):
        color = '#FF5252'
        ax2.text(j, y, aa, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=11, family='monospace',
                fontweight='bold', color='white',
                bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.15', facecolor=color, alpha=0.9))
    
    # Post-HPD
    for j, aa in enumerate(post[:8]):
        x = j + 3
        # Highlight conserved K/R at +1 (canonical) vs S/G (DNAJC28)
        if j == 0:
            color = '#FFB74D' if aa in 'SG' else '#81C784' if aa in 'KR' else '#EEEEEE'
        else:
            color = '#EEEEEE'
        ax2.text(x, y, aa, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, family='monospace',
                bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.15', facecolor=color, alpha=0.6))

# Labels
ax2.text(-9, len(alignment_data)+0.7, '← Helix II', fontsize=10, fontstyle='italic', color='gray')
ax2.text(0.5, len(alignment_data)+0.7, 'HPD', fontsize=10, fontstyle='italic', color='red', fontweight='bold')
ax2.text(4, len(alignment_data)+0.7, 'Post-HPD loop →', fontsize=10, fontstyle='italic', color='gray')

ax2.set_xlim(-19, 12)
ax2.set_ylim(0.3, len(alignment_data)+1.2)
ax2.set_title('J-domain Alignment (HPD-centered)', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
ax2.axis('off')

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#81C784', label='Charged (K/R)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#64B5F6', label='Hydrophobic (L/I/V/F/W/Y/M)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FF5252', label='HPD motif'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FFB74D', label='DNAJC28-specific (S/G at +1)'),
]
ax2.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower right', fontsize=8)

# ---- Panel 3: Functional Scorecard ----
ax3 = axes[2]
ax3.axis('off')

criteria = [
    ("HPD motif intact", "✓", "Essential", "#4CAF50"),
    ("Helix II amphipathic", "✓", "Essential", "#4CAF50"),
    ("HPD in inter-helix loop", "✓", "Essential", "#4CAF50"),
    ("Helix III present", "✓", "Important", "#4CAF50"),
    ("Conserved Y at HPD-1", "✓", "Important", "#4CAF50"),
    ("J-domain length (65 aa)", "✓", "Important", "#4CAF50"),
    ("High AlphaFold pLDDT (87.3)", "✓", "Supporting", "#4CAF50"),
    ("K/R at HPD+1", "S", "Moderate", "#FF9800"),
    ("Conserved N at HPD+2", "G", "Minor", "#FF9800"),
]

header = "Functional J-domain Assessment"
ax3.text(0.5, 0.95, header, transform=ax3.transAxes, fontsize=14, fontweight='bold',
        ha='center', va='top')

for i, (crit, status, imp, color) in enumerate(criteria):
    y = 0.85 - i * 0.09
    marker = '●' if status == '✓' else '◐'
    ax3.text(0.1, y, marker, transform=ax3.transAxes, fontsize=14, color=color, 
            ha='center', va='center', fontweight='bold')
    ax3.text(0.15, y, f"{crit}", transform=ax3.transAxes, fontsize=10, 
            ha='left', va='center')
    ax3.text(0.75, y, f"[{imp}]", transform=ax3.transAxes, fontsize=9, 
            ha='center', va='center', color='gray')
    ax3.text(0.9, y, status, transform=ax3.transAxes, fontsize=10, 
            ha='center', va='center', fontweight='bold', color=color)

verdict_y = 0.85 - len(criteria) * 0.09 - 0.02
ax3.text(0.5, verdict_y, 'VERDICT: Bona fide functional J-domain — NOT degenerate', 
        transform=ax3.transAxes, fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', ha='center', va='center',
        color='#2E7D32', bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.4', facecolor='#E8F5E9', edgecolor='#4CAF50'))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('dnajc28_jdomain_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
print("Comprehensive figure saved: dnajc28_jdomain_analysis.png")
